name: Phionyx: A Deterministic AI Runtime Architecture with Structured State Management and Pre-Response Governance

description: arXiv:2607.18246v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present Phionyx, a deterministic AI runtime architecture derived from the broader Echoism interaction framework that introduces a governance-first approach to AI engineering: treating large language model (LLM) outputs as noisy sensor measurements rather than direct decisions. Unlike probabilistic agents, Phionyx enforces deterministic state ev...
author: Ali Toygar Abak
